prompt: Create a photorealistic luxury editorial portrait of a young Black man in his early twenties standing in a manicured Gulf city park at golden hour. He faces the camera directly in a tight upper-body composition, calm neutral expression, natural skin texture, symmetrical face, sharp eyes, softly parted lips, and realistic facial proportions. Dress him in a pristine cream-colored Saudi thobe with subtle embroidered placket and chest pocket detail, plus a black-and-white checkered ghutra held by a thick black agal. His left arm is raised, hand gently touching the edge of the agal as if adjusting the headwear; show a silver metal wristwatch on that wrist and white wireless earbuds in both ears. Background: a lush green lawn, trimmed hedges, a few distant pedestrians, and tall modern luxury skyscrapers resembling Dubai Marina or Riyadh financial district, strongly blurred with shallow depth of field. Lighting should be warm late-afternoon sunlight from the side, producing soft golden highlights on the thobe and face, natural shadows, and a high-end travel-fashion magazine mood. Use an 8:10 vertical portrait crop, eye-level camera, 50mm lens look, realistic bokeh, crisp subject focus, refined color grading, no text, no watermark, no extra fingers, no distorted clothing, no artificial plastic skin.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic luxury editorial portrait of a young Black man in his early twenties standing in a manicured Gulf city park at golden hour. He faces the camera directly in a tight upper-body composition, calm neutral expression, natural skin texture, symmetrical face, sharp eyes, softly parted lips, and realistic facial proportions. Dress him in a pristine cream-colored Saudi thobe with subtle embroidered placket and chest pocket detail, plus a black-and-white checkered ghutra held by a thick black agal. His left arm is raised, hand gently touching the edge of the agal as if adjusting the headwear; show a silver metal wristwatch on that wrist and white wireless earbuds in both ears. Background: a lush green lawn, trimmed hedges, a few distant pedestrians, and tall modern luxury skyscrapers resembling Dubai Marina or Riyadh financial district, strongly blurred with shallow depth of field. Lighting should be warm late-afternoon sunlight from the side, producing soft golden highlights on the thobe and face, natural shadows, and a high-end travel-fashion magazine mood. Use an 8:10 vertical portrait crop, eye-level camera, 50mm lens look, realistic bokeh, crisp subject focus, refined color grading, no text, no watermark, no extra fingers, no distorted clothing, no artificial plastic skin.
promptZh: 创作一张照片级逼真的奢华时尚人像，展示一位年轻的 二十出头的黑人男性 站在精心修剪的海湾城市公园中，时间为黄金时刻。他正对镜头，采用紧凑的上半身构图，表情平静自然，皮肤纹理真实，面部对称，眼神锐利，双唇微启，面部比例写实。他身着一件洁净的奶油色沙特长袍（thobe），门襟和胸袋处有精致的刺绣细节，佩戴黑白格纹头巾（ghutra）和厚实的黑色头箍（agal）。他的左臂抬起，手轻轻触碰头巾边缘，仿佛正在整理头饰；手腕上佩戴一块银色金属腕表，双耳佩戴白色无线耳机。背景：郁郁葱葱的草坪、修剪整齐的树篱、远处零星的行人以及高耸的现代奢华摩天大楼，类似于 迪拜码头或利雅得金融区，背景经过强力模糊处理，呈现浅景深效果。光线应为温暖的午后侧光，在长袍和面部产生柔和的金色高光，阴影自然，营造出高端旅游时尚杂志的氛围。使用 8:10 竖向人像裁剪，平视镜头，50mm 镜头视觉，逼真的焦外成像，主体对焦清晰，色调精致，无文字，无水印，无多余手指，服装无畸变，无人工塑料感皮肤。
